heading: Omitted
label: 50g to 58 Omitted
notes: CodificationSections 50g to 58, relating to Territory of Alaska, were omitted in view of admission of Alaska into the Union.Section 50g, , , related to facilities at Alaska-Canadian border.act Aug. 2, 1956, ch. 883, § 170 Stat. 939Section 50h, , , required site selected under to consist of lands owned or controlled by the United States.act Aug. 2, 1956, ch. 883, § 270 Stat. 939section 50g of this titleSection 50i, , , provided for arrangements for use of sites and facilities.act Aug. 2, 1956, ch. 883, § 370 Stat. 939Section 50j, , , authorized appropriations for purposes of sections 50g to 50j of this title.act Aug. 2, 1956, ch. 883, § 470 Stat. 940Section 51, , , related to educational qualifications of voters and electors.act Mar. 3, 1927, ch. 363, § 144 Stat. 1392Section 52, , , provided that inability to read and write was a ground for challenge at polls.act Mar. 3, 1927, ch. 363, § 244 Stat. 1393Section 53, , , related to manner of proving ability to read and write.act Mar. 3, 1927, ch. 363, § 344 Stat. 1393Section 54, , , related to exemption from provisions of by reason of physical disability.act Mar. 3, 1927, ch. 363, § 444 Stat. 1393section 51 of this titleSection 55, , , authorized election judges to mark ballots for voters physically incapable of marking ballots.act Mar. 3, 1927, ch. 363, § 544 Stat. 1393Section 56, , , provided that persons refused permission to vote shall not make any further attempt to vote.act Mar. 3, 1927, ch. 363, § 644 Stat. 1393Section 57, , , enumerated qualifications requisite to voting.act Mar. 3, 1927, ch. 363, § 744 Stat. 1394Section 58, , , prescribed penalties for violation of sections 51 to 57 of this title.act Mar. 3, 1927, ch. 363, § 844 Stat. 1394
